updates.title: Self-update
updates.available_message: Version {{latest}} is ready to install (currently running {{current}}).
updates.confirm_install: Install version {{version}}? The container will briefly restart. Your data is preserved.
updates.up_to_date: You're running the latest stable release.
updates.channel_hint: Which releases are eligible to install.
updates.mode_hint: What happens when an update is available.

login.title: Sign in
login.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
login.restore_hint: Have a backup from a previous CloudGate install?

restore.title: Restore from backup
restore.intro: Upload an encrypted .cgbk file from a previous CloudGate install. This only works on a fresh container — your existing data is protected.
restore.note: After restore, the container needs to restart (a single 'docker restart cloudgate' or simply restart the host).
restore.success_body: {{files}} files restored ({{mb}} MB total). Restart the container, then login with your previous credentials.

password.title: Change password
password.force_message: Your current password was auto-generated. Please choose a new one before continuing.
password.hint: At least 12 characters. Choose something you haven't used elsewhere.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.placeholder_hint: Browse Cloudflare, Tunnels and Hosts in the sidebar.
dashboard.hosts_errors_message: {{count}} host(s) failed to deploy. Open the Hosts page and hover the red status badge for details.
dashboard.next_step_message: You have a Cloudflare account configured.

settings.title: Settings
settings.totp_hint: Add a second login step using an authenticator app like Aegis, Authy or 1Password.
settings.totp_scan_qr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code:
settings.totp_enabled_message: From now on, login requires your authenticator code.
settings.totp_disable_warning: Your account will be less secure. Confirm with your password.
settings.backup_hint: Exports your DB + secrets + tunnel credentials as a single encrypted file. Move to a new machine by importing during first-run setup (coming).
settings.backup_modal_hint: The passphrase encrypts the backup file. You'll need it to restore — store it somewhere safe, separately from the backup itself.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: All sensitive operations (login, 2FA changes, backups, host changes) are recorded here.
audit.empty: No audit entries yet. Activities will appear as you use CloudGate.

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare accounts
cloudflare.hint: Add your Cloudflare API token to let CloudGate create tunnels and DNS records on your behalf.
cloudflare.add_hint: Paste an API token with the scopes Tunnels:Edit, DNS:Edit and Zone:Read.
cloudflare.empty: No Cloudflare accounts yet. Add one to get started.
cloudflare.confirm_delete: Delete {{label}}? This removes the account and all cached zones.
cloudflare.no_zones: No zones cached. Click refresh to fetch them.

tunnels.title: Cloudflare tunnels
tunnels.empty: No tunnels yet. Create one to expose services.
tunnels.name_hint: Letters, numbers, dashes and underscores only.
tunnels.confirm_delete: Delete tunnel {{name}}? It will also be removed from Cloudflare.

hosts.title: Hosts
hosts.empty: No hosts yet. Add one to expose a local service.
hosts.no_tls_verify_hint: Tick this if your local service uses a self-signed cert.
hosts.no_cf_warning: Add a Cloudflare account first before creating hosts.
hosts.no_tunnel_warning: Create a tunnel first under Tunnels.
hosts.invalid_hostname: Enter a valid domain name (e.g. immich.example.com).
hosts.confirm_delete: Delete host {{hostname}}? DNS record will also be removed.
hosts.errors_present_body: Hover the red status badge for details. Often a missing token scope:
hosts.confirm_issue_cert: Acquire a Let's Encrypt certificate for {{hostname}} via DNS-01? CloudGate will create a temporary TXT record in Cloudflare and verify, then save the cert. Takes ~1 minute.
